calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Apr-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Petitioner Eric R. Eleson appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.
George Waters of Office ot the Attorney General telephone number 916-323-8050 appeared by telephone for Defendant Mark Paxson.
Peace Officer Danny Carrillo of the Mule Creek Prison was also on the line.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court ruled as follows: RESPONDENT MARK A. PAXSON, GENERAL COUNSEL'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/PROHIBITION/CERTIFICATION is sustained without leave to amend. Mr. Waters is to prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Apr-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Petitioner Eric Richard Eleson telephone number 209-274-5246 appeared by telephone in Propria Persona (Counselor Daniel Carrillo was also on the line, but did not address the Court).
Danielle Lee of Office of General Counsel telephone number 415-538-2517 for Defendant The State Bar of California.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court issued the following ruling:
RESPONDENT THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/PROHIBITION/CERTIFICATION is sustained without leave to amend on the ground that the State Bar has provided all documents in its possession that is responsive to Mr. Eleson's request as clarified at today's hearing. Ms. Lee is to prepare a form of order and provide it to the Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion To Strike, Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Apr-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Petitioner Eric Richard Eleson telephone number 209-274-5246 appeared by telephone in Propria Persona (Counselor Daniel Carrillo was also on the line, but did not address the Court).
Danielle Lee of Office of General Counsel telephone number 415-538-2517 for Defendant The State Bar of California.

PLAINTIFF ERIC ELESON'S Motion To Strike is off calendar in light of the ruling on the demurrer.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
